tasks.label: extension: install here
tasks.command: $workspace = (Get-Location).Path; $artifactsDir = Join-Path $workspace '.vscode-test'; $vsix = Join-Path $artifactsDir 'fast-symbol-indexer-current.vsix'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $artifactsDir | Out-Null; npm run compile; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npx @vscode/vsce package --out $vsix; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; code-insiders --install-extension $vsix --force

tasks.label: extension: run development host
tasks.command: $workspace = (Get-Location).Path; $artifactsDir = Join-Path $workspace '.vscode-test'; $userDataDir = Join-Path $artifactsDir 'dev-user-data'; $extensionsDir = Join-Path $artifactsDir 'dev-extensions'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $userDataDir, $extensionsDir | Out-Null; npm run compile; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; code-insiders --new-window --user-data-dir $userDataDir --extensions-dir $extensionsDir --extensionDevelopmentPath $workspace $workspace
